productDisplayName: Arrow Men Formal Red Tie+Cufflink+Pocket square - Combo Pack
description: A perfect gift for the man of style, this accessory set comprising a silky microfiber tie, matching cufflinks and a silk handkerchief, is every debonair charmer's dream. Tie Length: 150 cm Made of 100% microfibre Has diagonal stripes in red One loop and brand badge on the inner of the broad tongue to hold the narrow tongue in place Cufflink Width: 2 cm Rectangular cufflinks made of steel with a diagonal striped design Hinged back to hold the cuff link in place Kerchief Square kerchief with a 28 cm width Made of silk Tie and kerchief care Dry clean only
